title: Tokenized Assets Could Grow 100x by 2030, Says a16z
summary: Andreessen Horowitz predicts tokenized assets could grow 100 times by 2030. Companies like Securitize and Ondo Finance are leading this race, with major partners like BlackRock and the NYSE.
body:
Tokenized assets are expected to see massive growth over the next few years. Venture capital firm Andreessen Horowitz (a16z) has projected that the market for tokenized assets could grow 100 times by 2030. This growth is driven by the increasing adoption of blockchain technology to represent real-world assets like stocks, bonds, and real estate as digital tokens.

Leading the charge in this sector are companies like Securitize and Ondo Finance. Securitize, a leader in the tokenization space, has collaborated with major financial institutions such as BlackRock and the New York Stock Exchange. Ondo Finance, on the other hand, specializes in tokenizing Treasury bonds, making these traditionally complex assets more accessible and liquid.

For everyday people, this growth in tokenized assets means more opportunities to invest in a wider range of assets with lower barriers to entry. Tokenization can make investing in high-value assets like real estate or Treasury bonds more accessible, potentially democratizing investment opportunities. Additionally, the increased liquidity and transparency offered by blockchain technology can make these investments more efficient and secure.

If you're interested in this space, keep an eye on the developments from Securitize and Ondo Finance. Their partnerships and innovations will likely shape the future of tokenized assets. Watch for announcements from these companies and their collaborators, as they could signal new opportunities and advancements in the field.
